---
title: "BBB 26 — Painel de Reações"
subtitle: "Análise estratégica do Big Brother Brasil 2026 — reações, relações, votos e dinâmicas de poder"
lang: pt-BR
format:
  html:
    code-tools: false
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

```{python}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import plotly.express as px
import plotly.graph_objects as go
from pathlib import Path
from collections import OrderedDict
from datetime import datetime, timedelta, timezone
from html import escape

import sys
sys.path.append(str(Path("scripts").resolve()))
from data_utils import (
    require_clean_manual_events, setup_bbb_dark_theme,
    load_paredoes_raw, load_index_data, load_game_timeline,
    avatar_html as _avatar_html,
    REACTION_EMOJI, REACTION_SLUG_TO_LABEL, SENTIMENT_WEIGHTS,
    POSITIVE, MILD_NEGATIVE, STRONG_NEGATIVE, GROUP_COLORS,
    POWER_EVENT_EMOJI, POWER_EVENT_LABELS,
    ANALYSIS_DESCRIPTIONS, render_cronologia_html,
)
from paredao_viz import render_paredao_index_card

require_clean_manual_events()
setup_bbb_dark_theme()

```

```{python}
#| label: load-data

index_data = load_index_data()

if not index_data:
    raise RuntimeError("index_data.json não encontrado. Execute scripts/build_derived_data.py")

latest = index_data.get("latest", {})
MEMBER_OF = index_data.get("member_of", {})
AVATARS = index_data.get("avatars", {})

meta_generated_at = index_data.get("_metadata", {}).get("generated_at")
try:
    _gen_dt = datetime.fromisoformat(str(meta_generated_at).replace("Z", "+00:00"))
    DATA_GENERATED_DATE_BRT = _gen_dt.astimezone(timezone(timedelta(hours=-3))).date()
except Exception:
    DATA_GENERATED_DATE_BRT = datetime.now(timezone(timedelta(hours=-3))).date()
```

```{python}
#| label: viz-functions
#| include: false

def make_sentiment_ranking(rows, title_suffix="", fixed_height=None):
    """Retorna go.Figure com ranking horizontal de sentimento."""
    if not rows:
        return go.Figure()

    df_sent = pd.DataFrame(rows).sort_values('score', ascending=True)

    color_map = {name: GROUP_COLORS.get(m, '#999')
                 for name, m in zip(df_sent['name'], df_sent['group'])}

    fig = go.Figure()
    fig.add_trace(go.Bar(
        y=df_sent['name'],
        x=df_sent['score'],
        orientation='h',
        marker_color=[color_map[n] for n in df_sent['name']],
        text=[f"{s:+.1f}" for s in df_sent['score']],
        textposition='outside',
        hovertemplate='%{y}: %{x:+.1f}<br>❤️: %{customdata[0]} | Neg: %{customdata[1]}<extra></extra>',
        customdata=list(zip(df_sent['hearts'], df_sent['negative'])),
        showlegend=False
    ))

    title = "Ranking de Sentimento"
    if title_suffix:
        title += f" — {title_suffix}"

    left_margin = 150
    chart_height = fixed_height if fixed_height else max(500, len(df_sent) * 32)

    fig.update_layout(
        title=title,
        xaxis_title="Score de Sentimento",
        yaxis_title="",
        height=chart_height,
        margin=dict(l=left_margin),
        shapes=[dict(type='line', x0=0, x1=0, y0=-0.5, y1=len(df_sent)-0.5,
                     line=dict(color='red', dash='dash', width=1))]
    )

    for group, color in GROUP_COLORS.items():
        fig.add_trace(go.Scatter(
            x=[None], y=[None], mode='markers',
            marker=dict(size=10, color=color),
            name=group, showlegend=True
        ))

    return fig


def make_cross_table_heatmap(participants, matrix, title_suffix=""):
    """Retorna go.Figure com heatmap da tabela cruzada de reações."""
    active_names_ht = sorted([p['name'] for p in participants
                              if not p.get('characteristics', {}).get('eliminated')])

    heat_data = np.zeros((len(active_names_ht), len(active_names_ht)))
    rxn_labels = []
    for i, giver in enumerate(active_names_ht):
        row_labels = []
        for j, receiver in enumerate(active_names_ht):
            if giver == receiver:
                heat_data[i, j] = np.nan
                row_labels.append('—')
            else:
                rxn = matrix.get((giver, receiver), '')
                weight = SENTIMENT_WEIGHTS.get(rxn, 0)
                heat_data[i, j] = weight
                emoji = REACTION_EMOJI.get(rxn, '?')
                row_labels.append(emoji)
        rxn_labels.append(row_labels)

    short_names = [n.split()[0] if len(n) > 12 else n for n in active_names_ht]

    fig = go.Figure(data=go.Heatmap(
        z=heat_data,
        x=short_names,
        y=short_names,
        colorscale=[
            [0, '#d73027'],
            [0.25, '#fc8d59'],
            [0.5, '#ffffbf'],
            [1.0, '#1a9850'],
        ],
        zmin=-1, zmax=1,
        text=[[rxn_labels[i][j] for j in range(len(active_names_ht))] for i in range(len(active_names_ht))],
        texttemplate='%{text}',
        textfont=dict(size=14),
        hovertemplate='%{y} → %{x}: %{text}<extra></extra>',
        colorbar=dict(title="Sentimento", tickvals=[-1, -0.5, 0, 1],
                      ticktext=['Forte Neg', 'Leve Neg', 'Neutro', 'Positivo'])
    ))

    title = "Mapa de Reações"
    if title_suffix:
        title += f" — {title_suffix}"

    fig.update_layout(
        title=title,
        xaxis_title="Receptor ←",
        yaxis_title="Emissor →",
        height=750,
        xaxis=dict(tickangle=45, side='bottom'),
        yaxis=dict(autorange='reversed')
    )

    return fig


def make_cross_table_html(cross_data, title_suffix=""):
    """Retorna HTML string com tabela cruzada de reações (sticky header/column)."""
    active_names = cross_data.get("names", [])
    matrix = cross_data.get("matrix", [])
    short_names = [n.split()[0] if len(n) > 10 else n for n in active_names]

    # Color mapping based on sentiment
    def get_cell_style(rxn):
        if not rxn:
            return "background: #444; color: #888;"
        weight = SENTIMENT_WEIGHTS.get(rxn, 0)
        if weight == 1:  # Positive
            return "background: #1a9850; color: #fff;"
        elif weight == -0.5:  # Mild negative
            return "background: #fc8d59; color: #000;"
        elif weight == -1:  # Strong negative
            return "background: #d73027; color: #fff;"
        return "background: #ffffbf; color: #000;"

    # Build HTML table
    html = []
    html.append(f'''
<div class="scroll-x">
<style>
.cross-table {{
    border-collapse: separate;
    border-spacing: 0;
    font-size: var(--fs-base);
    width: max-content;
}}
.cross-table th, .cross-table td {{
    padding: 4px 6px;
    text-align: center;
    border: 1px solid #555;
    min-width: 36px;
    white-space: nowrap;
}}
.cross-table thead th {{
    position: sticky;
    top: 0;
    background: #222;
    z-index: 2;
    font-weight: bold;
}}
.cross-table tbody th {{
    position: sticky;
    left: 0;
    background: #222;
    z-index: 1;
    font-weight: bold;
    text-align: right;
}}
.cross-table thead th:first-child {{
    z-index: 3;
    left: 0;
}}
.cross-table td {{ font-size: var(--fs-xl); }}
.cross-table td:hover {{ outline: 2px solid #fff; }}
</style>
<table class="cross-table">
<thead>
<tr>
<th class="u-s001">→ deu / ↓ recebeu</th>
''')

    # Header row with receiver names
    for short in short_names:
        html.append(f'<th>{short}</th>')
    html.append('</tr></thead><tbody>')

    # Data rows
    for i, giver in enumerate(active_names):
        html.append(f'<tr><th>{short_names[i]}</th>')
        for j, receiver in enumerate(active_names):
            if giver == receiver:
                html.append('<td class="u-s117">—</td>')
            else:
                rxn = matrix[i][j] if i < len(matrix) and j < len(matrix[i]) else ""
                emoji = REACTION_EMOJI.get(rxn, '?') if rxn else '?'
                style = get_cell_style(rxn)
                tooltip = f"{giver} → {receiver}: {rxn or 'N/A'}"
                html.append(f'<td style=\"{style}\" title=\"{tooltip}\">{emoji}</td>')
        html.append('</tr>')

    html.append('</tbody></table></div>')

    return '\n'.join(html)


def make_reaction_summary_html(summary_data, collapsed_rows=5):
    """Retorna HTML com tabela de reações recebidas, colapsável com cores."""
    summary_rows = summary_data.get("rows", [])
    max_hearts = summary_data.get("max_hearts", 1) or 1
    max_neg = summary_data.get("max_neg", 1) or 1
    n_total = len(summary_rows)

    def heart_color(val):
        if val == 0: return "color: #666;"
        intensity = min(val / max_hearts, 1)
        if intensity > 0.7: return "background: #1a9850; color: #fff; font-weight: bold;"
        if intensity > 0.4: return "background: #91cf60; color: #000;"
        return "color: #a6d96a;"

    def neg_color(val):
        if val == 0: return "color: #666;"
        if val >= 3: return "background: #d73027; color: #fff; font-weight: bold;"
        if val >= 2: return "background: #fc8d59; color: #000;"
        return "color: #fdae61;"

    def score_color(val):
        if val >= 10: return "background: #1a9850; color: #fff; font-weight: bold;"
        if val >= 5: return "color: #66bd63;"
        if val >= 0: return "color: #a6d96a;"
        if val >= -5: return "color: #fdae61;"
        if val >= -10: return "color: #f46d43;"
        return "background: #d73027; color: #fff; font-weight: bold;"

    html = []
    html.append(f'''
<style>
.summary-table {{
    border-collapse: collapse;
    font-size: var(--fs-base);
    width: 100%;
}}
.summary-table th, .summary-table td {{
    padding: 6px 8px;
    text-align: center;
    border-bottom: 1px solid #444;
}}
.summary-table th {{
    background: #222;
    position: sticky;
    top: 0;
    z-index: 1;
}}
.summary-table th:first-child, .summary-table td:first-child {{
    text-align: left;
    position: sticky;
    left: 0;
    background: #222;
    z-index: 2;
}}
.summary-table thead th:first-child {{ z-index: 3; }}
.summary-table tbody tr:hover {{ background: #333; }}
.collapsed-rows {{ display: none; }}
.expand-btn {{
    display: block;
    width: 100%;
    padding: 10px;
    margin-top: 8px;
    background: #2a2a2a;
    border: 1px solid #444;
    border-radius: 6px;
    color: #ccc;
    cursor: pointer;
    font-size: var(--fs-base);
}}
.expand-btn:hover {{ background: #333; }}
</style>
<div class="scroll-x">
<table class="summary-table" id="reaction-summary-table">
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Participante</th>
<th>❤️</th>
<th>🌱</th>
<th>💼</th>
<th>🍪</th>
<th>🐍</th>
<th>🎯</th>
<th>🤮</th>
<th>🤥</th>
<th>💔</th>
<th>Score</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
''')

    for i, r in enumerate(summary_rows):
        row_class = 'collapsed-rows' if i >= collapsed_rows else ''
        html.append(f'<tr class="{row_class}">')
        html.append(f'<td>{r["name"]}</td>')
        html.append(f'<td style="{heart_color(r["hearts"])}">{r["hearts"]}</td>')
        html.append(f'<td style="{neg_color(r["planta"])}">{r["planta"] or "·"}</td>')
        html.append(f'<td style="{neg_color(r["mala"])}">{r["mala"] or "·"}</td>')
        html.append(f'<td style="{neg_color(r["biscoito"])}">{r["biscoito"] or "·"}</td>')
        html.append(f'<td style="{neg_color(r["cobra"])}">{r["cobra"] or "·"}</td>')
        html.append(f'<td style="{neg_color(r["alvo"])}">{r["alvo"] or "·"}</td>')
        html.append(f'<td style="{neg_color(r["vomito"])}">{r["vomito"] or "·"}</td>')
        html.append(f'<td style="{neg_color(r["mentiroso"])}">{r["mentiroso"] or "·"}</td>')
        html.append(f'<td style="{neg_color(r["coracao_partido"])}">{r["coracao_partido"] or "·"}</td>')
        html.append(f'<td style="{score_color(r["score"])}">{r["score"]:+.1f}</td>')
        html.append('</tr>')

    html.append('</tbody></table></div>')

    if n_total > collapsed_rows:
        html.append(f'''
<button class="expand-btn" onclick="
    var rows = document.querySelectorAll('.collapsed-rows');
    var btn = this;
    if (btn.dataset.expanded === 'true') {{
        rows.forEach(r => r.style.display = 'none');
        btn.innerHTML = '▼ Ver todos os {n_total} participantes';
        btn.dataset.expanded = 'false';
    }} else {{
        rows.forEach(r => r.style.display = 'table-row');
        btn.innerHTML = '▲ Mostrar menos';
        btn.dataset.expanded = 'true';
    }}
" data-expanded="false">▼ Ver todos os {n_total} participantes</button>
''')

    return '\n'.join(html)


```

# Cronologia do Jogo {#cronologia-jogo}

Linha do tempo dos eventos da temporada — próximos eventos e histórico recente.

```{python}
#| label: timeline-events-index
#| output: asis

timeline_events = load_game_timeline().get("events", [])
if timeline_events:
    print(render_cronologia_html(timeline_events))
else:
    print("<p class='text-muted'>Nenhum evento na cronologia.</p>")
```

```{python}
#| label: compute-highlights
#| output: asis

date_display_pt = index_data.get("highlights", {}).get("date_display", "")
hl_cards = index_data.get("highlights", {}).get("cards", [])

CARD_STORY_ORDER = {
    "context": 0,
    "ranking": 10,
    "changes": 20,
    "dramatic": 30,
    "hostilities": 40,
    "sincerao": 50,
    "paredao": 60,
    "breaks": 70,
    "blindados": 80,
    "impact": 90,
    "positive_impact": 100,
    "vulnerability": 110,
    "mais_alvo": 120,
    "mais_agressor": 130,
    "vip": 140,
    "xepa": 150,
}
hl_cards = sorted(hl_cards, key=lambda c: CARD_STORY_ORDER.get(c.get("type"), 999))

def fmt_date_br(date_str: str) -> str:
    if not date_str:
        return ""
    try:
        return datetime.strptime(date_str, "%Y-%m-%d").strftime("%d/%m")
    except Exception:
        return date_str

def days_ago_str(date_str: str, ref_date: str | None = None) -> str:
    if not date_str:
        return ""
    # Relative labels should reflect real calendar date (BRT anchor), not latest data date.
    # Anchor to build date metadata when available.
    _anchor_brt = DATA_GENERATED_DATE_BRT
    try:
        d0 = datetime.strptime(date_str, "%Y-%m-%d").date()
    except Exception:
        return ""
    delta = (_anchor_brt - d0).days
    if delta < 0:
        return ""
    if delta == 0:
        return "hoje"
    if delta == 1:
        return "há 1 dia"
    return f"há {delta} dias"

def av(name, size=48, border_color="#555"):
    """Avatar image tag, clickable to the participant's profile."""
    slug = name.lower().replace(" ", "-")
    return _avatar_html(name, AVATARS, size=size, show_name=False,
                        link=f'#perfil-{slug}', border_color=border_color,
                        fallback_initials=True)

def av_group_border(name: str) -> str:
    grp = MEMBER_OF.get(name, "")
    return GROUP_COLORS.get(grp, "#666")

def card_header(icon, title, link=None, badge=None, source_tag=None, subtitle=None):
    """Card header with icon, title, optional link, badge, data source tag, and subtitle."""
    title_html = title
    link_html = f' <a href="{link}" class="fs-xs u-s254">ver mais ↗</a>' if link else ""
    badge_html = f' <span class="fs-xs u-s187">{badge}</span>' if badge else ""
    source_html = f' <span class="fs-2xs u-s253">{source_tag}</span>' if source_tag else ""
    subtitle_html = f'<div class="fs-sm u-s258">{subtitle}</div>' if subtitle else ""
    return (f'<div class="u-s073">'
            f'<div class="u-s333">'
            f'<span class="fs-2xl">{icon}</span>'
            f'<span class="fs-base u-s392">{title_html}</span>'
            f'{badge_html}{source_html}{link_html}'
            f'</div>'
            f'{subtitle_html}</div>')

def stat_chip(value, label, color="#888"):
    """Small stat chip."""
    return (f'<span class="u-s373">'
            f'<span class="fs-xl" style="font-weight:700;color:{color};">{value}</span>'
            f'<span class="fs-2xs u-s259">{label}</span></span>')

def progress_bar(value, max_val, color="#3498db", height=6):
    """Mini progress bar."""
    pct = min(100, value / max_val * 100) if max_val > 0 else 0
    return (f'<div style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.08);border-radius:{height//2}px;height:{height}px;width:100%;overflow:hidden;">'
            f'<div style="width:{pct:.0f}%;height:100%;background:{color};border-radius:{height//2}px;"></div></div>')


def relationship_story_card(giver, receiver, shift_label, meta_text, *, tone="dramatic", giver_border=None, receiver_border=None):
    """Centered pair card used by dramatic changes, hostilities, and alliance breaks."""
    giver_short = giver.split()[0]
    receiver_short = receiver.split()[0]
    giver_border = giver_border or av_group_border(giver)
    receiver_border = receiver_border or av_group_border(receiver)
    return (
        f'<div class="relationship-story-card tone-{tone}">'
        f'<div class="relationship-story-row">'
        f'<div class="relationship-story-person">'
        f'{av(giver, 46, giver_border)}'
        f'<span class="relationship-story-name">{escape(giver_short)}</span>'
        f'</div>'
        f'<div class="relationship-story-shift">{escape(shift_label)}</div>'
        f'<div class="relationship-story-person">'
        f'{av(receiver, 46, receiver_border)}'
        f'<span class="relationship-story-name">{escape(receiver_short)}</span>'
        f'</div>'
        f'</div>'
        f'<div class="relationship-story-meta">{escape(meta_text)}</div>'
        f'</div>'
    )


def render_blindado_tag(text, tone="neutral"):
    """Small pill for blindados detail tags."""
    return f'<span class="blindado-tag tone-{tone}">{escape(text)}</span>'


if not hl_cards:
    print(f'''<div class="dark-card tc u-s468">
📅 Primeiro dia de dados — sem comparações disponíveis ainda.</div>''')
else:
    # Extract context card data for the header
    ctx = next((c for c in hl_cards if c.get("type") == "context"), {})
    ctx_week = ctx.get("week", "?")
    ctx_days = ctx.get("days", 0)
    ctx_active = ctx.get("active", 0)

    # Section header with context stats
    print(f'''<div class="u-s442">
<h2 class="fs-2xl u-s435">📋 Destaques do Dia <span class="fs-base u-s250">({date_display_pt})</span></h2>
<div class="u-s399"></div>
<div class="fs-base u-s365">
<span>📅 <b class="text-light">Semana {ctx_week}</b></span>
<span>{ctx_days} dias de dados</span>
<span>{ctx_active} participantes ativos</span>
</div>
</div>''')

    print('<div class="u-s371">')

    for card in hl_cards:
        ctype = card.get("type")
        color = card.get("color", "#555")

        # ── 🏆 Ranking ──
        if ctype == "ranking":
            leader = card["leader"]
            streak = card.get("streak", 1)
            streak_txt = f"{streak}º dia consecutivo" if streak > 1 else "hoje"
            podium = card.get("podium", [])
            bottom3 = card.get("bottom3", [])
            podium_all = card.get("podium_all") or podium
            bottom_all = card.get("bottom_all") or bottom3
            delta_all = card.get("delta_all", [])
            mup = card.get("movers_up")
            mdown = card.get("movers_down")
            movers_label = card.get("movers_label", "📅 Variação vs ontem")

            header = card_header(
                card["icon"], card["title"], card.get("link"), streak_txt,
                source_tag="📸 Queridômetro hoje",
                subtitle="Score de hoje (❤️ = +1, negativas = −0.5 a −1). Dado do dia, não acumulado."
            )

            # ── Top (inline + in-card toggle for all) ──
            medals = ["🥇", "🥈", "🥉", "4º", "5º"]
            inline_podium = podium_all[:5]
            overflow_podium = podium_all[5:]
            podium_html = '<div>'
            podium_html += '<div class="fs-2xs u-s060">⬆ Mais queridos</div>'
            podium_html += '<div class="u-s065">'
            for i, p in enumerate(inline_podium):
                name = p["name"]
                score = p["score"]
                border = av_group_border(name)
                label = medals[i] if i < len(medals) else f"{i+1}º"
                podium_html += (
                    f'<div class="u-s344">'
                    f'{av(name, 42, border)}'
                    f'<span class="fs-md u-s026">{label} {name.split()[0]} {score:+.1f}</span>'
                    f'</div>'
                )
            podium_html += '</div></div>'
            if overflow_podium:
                podium_html += '<details class="sinc-more"><summary>+{} restantes</summary><div class="u-s065">'.format(len(overflow_podium))
                for i, p in enumerate(overflow_podium, start=len(inline_podium) + 1):
                    name = p["name"]
                    score = p["score"]
                    border = av_group_border(name)
                    label = f"{i}º"
                    podium_html += (
                        f'<div class="u-s344">'
                        f'{av(name, 42, border)}'
                        f'<span class="fs-md u-s026">{label} {name.split()[0]} {score:+.1f}</span>'
                        f'</div>'
                    )
                podium_html += '</div></details>'

            # ── Bottom (inline + in-card toggle for all) ──
            bottom_html = ""
            if bottom_all:
                inline_bottom = bottom_all[:5]
                overflow_bottom = bottom_all[5:]
                bottom_html = '<div>'
                bottom_html += '<div class="fs-2xs u-s060">⬇ Menos queridos</div>'
                bottom_html += '<div class="u-s065">'
                for p in inline_bottom:
                    name = p["name"]
                    score = p["score"]
                    score_color = "#e74c3c" if score < 0 else ("#f39c12" if score < 3 else "#aaa")
                    bottom_html += (
                        f'<div class="u-s340">'
                        f'{av(name, 42, av_group_border(name))}'
                        f'<span class="fs-md" style="color:{score_color};font-weight:700;">⬇ {name.split()[0]} {score:+.1f}</span>'
                        f'</div>'
                    )
                bottom_html += '</div></div>'
                if overflow_bottom:
                    bottom_html += '<details class="sinc-more"><summary>+{} restantes</summary><div class="u-s065">'.format(len(overflow_bottom))
                    for p in overflow_bottom:
                        name = p["name"]
                        score = p["score"]
                        score_color = "#e74c3c" if score < 0 else ("#f39c12" if score < 3 else "#aaa")
                        bottom_html += (
                            f'<div class="u-s340">'
                            f'{av(name, 42, av_group_border(name))}'
                            f'<span class="fs-md" style="color:{score_color};font-weight:700;">⬇ {name.split()[0]} {score:+.1f}</span>'
                            f'</div>'
                        )
                    bottom_html += '</div></details>'

            # ── Movers (inline + in-card toggle for all deltas) ──
            movers_html = ""
            mup_list = mup if isinstance(mup, list) else ([mup] if mup else [])
            mdown_list = mdown if isinstance(mdown, list) else ([mdown] if mdown else [])
            inline_deltas = []
            if mup_list or mdown_list:
                inline_deltas = [{"name": d["name"], "delta": d["delta"]} for d in mup_list + mdown_list]
            elif delta_all:
                inline_deltas = delta_all[:6]
            if inline_deltas:
                inline_names = {d["name"] for d in inline_deltas}
                overflow_deltas = [d for d in delta_all if d.get("name") not in inline_names]
                movers_html = '<div>'
                movers_html += f'<div class="fs-2xs u-s060">{movers_label}</div>'
                movers_html += '<div class="u-s065">'
                for d in inline_deltas:
                    is_up = d.get("delta", 0) >= 0
                    name = d["name"]
                    icon = "📈" if is_up else "📉"
                    row_cls = "u-s345" if is_up else "u-s341"
                    text_cls = "fs-md u-s026" if is_up else "text-neg fs-md"
                    movers_html += (
                        f'<div class="{row_cls}">'
                        f'{av(name, 42, av_group_border(name))}'
                        f'<span class="{text_cls}">{icon} {name.split()[0]} {d["delta"]:+.1f}</span>'
                        f'</div>'
                    )
                movers_html += '</div></div>'
                if overflow_deltas:
                    movers_html += '<details class="sinc-more"><summary>+{} restantes</summary><div class="u-s065">'.format(len(overflow_deltas))
                    for d in overflow_deltas:
                        is_up = d.get("delta", 0) >= 0
                        name = d["name"]
                        icon = "📈" if is_up else "📉"
                        row_cls = "u-s345" if is_up else "u-s341"
                        text_cls = "fs-md u-s026" if is_up else "text-neg fs-md"
                        movers_html += (
                            f'<div class="{row_cls}">'
                            f'{av(name, 42, av_group_border(name))}'
                            f'<span class="{text_cls}">{icon} {name.split()[0]} {d["delta"]:+.1f}</span>'
                            f'</div>'
                        )
                    movers_html += '</div></details>'

            # 3-column grid on desktop, stacks on mobile
            print(f'''<div class="dark-card" style="grid-column:1/-1;border-top:4px solid {color};padding:1rem 1.2rem;">
{header}
<div class="u-s370">
{podium_html}
{bottom_html}
{movers_html}
</div>
</div>''')

        # ── 📊 Changes ──
        elif ctype == "changes":
            total = card["total"]
            pct = card["pct"]
            imp = card["improve"]
            wor = card["worsen"]
            lat = card["lateral"]
            hg = card["hearts_gained"]
            hl_lost = card["hearts_lost"]
            direction_color = "#27ae60" if imp > wor else ("#e74c3c" if wor > imp else "#f39c12")
            total_delta = max(1, imp + wor + lat)
            net = imp - wor
            net_txt = f"+{net}" if net > 0 else str(net)

            def _pulse_row(label: str, value: int, color_row: str) -> str:
                return (
                    f'<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:90px 1fr auto;gap:8px;align-items:center;">'
                    f'<span class="fs-2xs" style="color:#aaa;">{label}</span>'
                    f'{progress_bar(value, total_delta, color_row, height=6)}'
                    f'<span class="fs-sm" style="color:{color_row};font-weight:700;">{value}</span>'
                    f'</div>'
                )

            print(f'''<div class="info-panel" style="border-left-color:{color};">
{card_header(card["icon"], card["title"], card.get("link"), source_tag="📅 Ontem → Hoje", subtitle="Mudanças de ontem para hoje no queridômetro. Melhoria = reação ficou mais positiva; piora = mais negativa.")}
<div class="u-s332">
<span class="fs-4xl u-s393">{total}</span>
<span class="fs-base u-s001">reações mudaram <span style="color:{direction_color};font-weight:600;">({pct}%)</span></span>
</div>
<div style="display:grid;gap:6px;margin-top:4px;">
{_pulse_row("Melhorias", imp, "#27ae60")}
{_pulse_row("Pioras", wor, "#e74c3c")}
{_pulse_row("Laterais", lat, "#888")}
</div>
<div class="fs-sm u-s362" style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;">
<span class="u-s054">+{hg} ❤️ ganhos</span>
<span class="u-s005">-{hl_lost} ❤️ perdidos</span>
<span style="color:{direction_color};font-weight:700;">saldo {net_txt}</span>
</div>
</div>''')

        # ── 💥 Dramatic + ⚠️ Hostilities — pair-based cards ──
        elif ctype in ("dramatic", "hostilities"):
            items = card.get("items", [])
            total = card.get("total", len(items))
            is_hostile = ctype == "hostilities"
            scope = card.get("scope", "today")
            today_count = card.get("today_count", total if scope == "today" else 0)
            latest_date = card.get("latest_date", "")
            ref_date = card.get("reference_date") or latest.get("date")
            badge = f"{today_count}" if scope == "today" else f"{total}"
            source_tag = "📅 Ontem → Hoje" if scope == "today" else "📅 Histórico recente"
            card_title = card["title"] if scope == "today" else (
                "Hostilidades Recentes" if is_hostile else "Mudanças Dramáticas"
            )
            if is_hostile:
                subtitle = (
                    "Quem passou a dar reação negativa a alguém que ainda dá ❤️ para eles. O receptor não sabe."
                    if scope == "today"
                    else f"Sem novas hostilidades hoje. Últimos casos registrados (mais recente: {fmt_date_br(latest_date)})."
                )
                ch = card_header(card["icon"], card_title, card.get("link"), badge,
                    source_tag=source_tag,
                    subtitle=subtitle
                )
            else:
                subtitle = (
                    "Trocas extremas: de ❤️ para negativo ou vice-versa."
                    if scope == "today"
                    else f"Sem mudanças dramáticas hoje. Últimos casos registrados (mais recente: {fmt_date_br(latest_date)})."
                )
                ch = card_header(card["icon"], card_title, card.get("link"), badge,
                    source_tag=source_tag,
                    subtitle=subtitle
                )

            def _event_row(it: dict) -> str:
                g = it["giver"]
                r = it["receiver"]
                date_str = it.get("date", "")
                when = fmt_date_br(date_str)
                age_txt = days_ago_str(date_str, ref_date)
                when_txt = when
                if age_txt:
                    when_txt = f"{when} ({age_txt})" if when else age_txt

                if is_hostile:
                    old_e = it.get("old_emoji", "?")
                    new_e = it.get("new_emoji", it.get("emoji", "?"))
                    shift_txt = f"{old_e} → {new_e}"
                    meta_txt = f"Hostilidade unilateral · {when_txt}"
                    g_color, r_color = "#f39c12", "#e74c3c"
                    tone = "hostile"
                else:
                    old_e = it.get("old_emoji", "?")
                    new_e = it.get("new_emoji", "?")
                    sev = it.get("severity", 0)
                    sev_txt = "Mudança alta" if sev >= 1.5 else ("Mudança média" if sev >= 1.0 else "Mudança leve")
                    shift_txt = f"{old_e} → {new_e}"
                    meta_txt = f"{sev_txt} · {when_txt}"
                    g_color, r_color = "#666", "#27ae60" if new_e == "❤️" else "#e74c3c"
                    tone = "dramatic"

                return relationship_story_card(
                    g,
                    r,
                    shift_txt,
                    meta_txt,
                    tone=tone,
                    giver_border=g_color,
                    receiver_border=r_color,
                )

            inline_items = items[:4]
            overflow_items = items[4:]
            pairs_html = '<div class="u-s358">'
            pairs_html += "".join(_event_row(it) for it in inline_items)
            if overflow_items:
                pairs_html += (
                    f'<details class="sinc-more">'
                    f'<summary>+{len(overflow_items)} restantes</summary>'
                    f'<div class="u-s358">'
                    f'{"".join(_event_row(it) for it in overflow_items)}'
                    f'</div>'
                    f'</details>'
                )
            pairs_html += '</div>'

            print(f'''<div class="info-panel" style="border-left-color:{color};">
{ch}
{pairs_html}
</div>''')

        # ── 🔥 Sincerão (unified: radar + contradictions) ──
        elif ctype == "sincerao":
            radar = card.get("radar", {})
            contras = card.get("contradictions", [])
            aligned_neg = card.get("aligned_neg", [])
            fmt = card.get("format", "")
            reaction_reference_date = card.get("reaction_reference_date")
            neg_ranked = radar.get("neg_ranked", [])
            pos_ranked = radar.get("pos_ranked", [])
            not_targeted = radar.get("not_targeted", [])

            INLINE_MAX_RANKED = 4
            INLINE_MAX_PAIRS = 3

            subtitle = fmt if fmt else "Resumo semanal do Sincerão × Queridômetro."
            if reaction_reference_date:
                try:
                    reaction_ref_pt = datetime.strptime(reaction_reference_date, "%Y-%m-%d").strftime("%d/%m")
                except Exception:
                    reaction_ref_pt = reaction_reference_date
                subtitle = f"{subtitle} Reações de referência: {reaction_ref_pt}."

            def _rank_chip(entry: dict, lane_type: str, is_top: bool, *, force_count: int | None = None) -> str:
                name = entry.get("name", "")
                first = name.split()[0] if name else "?"
                slug = name.lower().replace(" ", "-")
                count = force_count if force_count is not None else int(entry.get("count", 0) or 0)
                lane_colors = {
                    "attack": "#e67e22",
                    "praise": "#27ae60",
                    "safe": "#3498db",
                }
                avatar = _avatar_html(
                    name,
                    AVATARS,
                    size=30,
                    show_name=False,
                    border_color=lane_colors.get(lane_type, "#666"),
                    fallback_initials=True,
                )
                top_cls = " top" if is_top else ""
                return (
                    f'<a href="#perfil-{slug}" class="sinc-person-chip {lane_type}{top_cls}">'
                    f'<span class="sinc-person-avatar">{avatar}</span>'
                    f'<span class="sinc-person-meta">'
                    f'<span class="sinc-person-name">{first}</span>'
                    f'<span class="sinc-count-badge {lane_type}">{count}x</span>'
                    f'</span>'
                    f'</a>'
                )

            def _render_ranked_lane(
                title: str,
                icon: str,
                ranked: list[dict],
                empty_text: str,
                lane_type: str,
                *,
                highlight_top: bool = True,
                force_count: int | None = None,
            ) -> str:
                lane = [f'<div class="sinc-lane"><div class="sinc-lane-head">{icon} {title}</div>']
                if not ranked:
                    lane.append(f'<div class="sinc-empty">{empty_text}</div></div>')
                    return "".join(lane)

                top_count = ranked[0].get("count", 0)
                inline_items = ranked[:INLINE_MAX_RANKED]
                overflow_items = ranked[INLINE_MAX_RANKED:]
                lane.append('<div class="sinc-people-grid">')
                lane.extend(
                    _rank_chip(
                        it,
                        lane_type,
                        highlight_top and it.get("count", 0) == top_count,
                        force_count=force_count,
                    )
                    for it in inline_items
                )
                lane.append('</div>')
                if overflow_items:
                    lane.append(
                        f'<details class="sinc-more"><summary>+{len(overflow_items)} restantes</summary>'
                        f'<div class="sinc-more-list"><div class="sinc-people-grid">'
                    )
                    lane.extend(_rank_chip(it, lane_type, False, force_count=force_count) for it in overflow_items)
                    lane.append('</div></div></details>')
                lane.append('</div>')
                return "".join(lane)

            def _render_pair_lane(title: str, icon: str, pairs: list[dict], mode: str, *, show_header: bool = True) -> str:
                lane = ['<div class="sinc-lane">']
                if show_header:
                    lane.append(f'<div class="sinc-lane-head">{icon} {title}</div>')
                if not pairs:
                    lane.append('<div class="sinc-empty">Sem casos nesta semana.</div></div>')
                    return "".join(lane)

                inline_items = pairs[:INLINE_MAX_PAIRS]
                overflow_items = pairs[INLINE_MAX_PAIRS:]

                def _pair_chip(item: dict) -> str:
                    a_name = item.get("ator", "")
                    b_name = item.get("alvo", "")
                    a_first = a_name.split()[0] if a_name else "?"
                    b_first = b_name.split()[0] if b_name else "?"
                    a_slug = a_name.lower().replace(" ", "-")
                    b_slug = b_name.lower().replace(" ", "-")
                    tipo = item.get("tipo_label", "?")
                    emoji = item.get("emoji", "?")
                    if mode == "contra":
                        detail = f"{tipo} mas dá {emoji}"
                    else:
                        detail = f"{tipo} + {emoji}"
                    return (
                        f'<span class="sinc-chip-muted">'
                        f'<a href="#perfil-{a_slug}" class="sinc-chip">{a_first}</a>'
                        f' → <a href="#perfil-{b_slug}" class="sinc-chip">{b_first}</a> '
                        f'<span class="sinc-chip-muted">({detail})</span>'
                        f'</span>'
                    )

                lane.append('<div class="sinc-chip-wrap">')
                lane.extend(_pair_chip(it) for it in inline_items)
                lane.append('</div>')
                if overflow_items:
                    lane.append(
                        f'<details class="sinc-more"><summary>+{len(overflow_items)} restantes</summary>'
                        f'<div class="sinc-more-list">'
                    )
                    lane.extend(_pair_chip(it) for it in overflow_items)
                    lane.append('</div></details>')
                lane.append('</div>')
                return "".join(lane)

            def _render_toggle_pair_lane(title: str, icon: str, pairs: list[dict], mode: str) -> str:
                count = len(pairs)
                body = _render_pair_lane(title, icon, pairs, mode, show_header=False)
                return (
                    f'<details class="sinc-toggle">'
                    f'<summary>{icon} {title} <span class="sinc-toggle-count">({count})</span></summary>'
                    f'{body}'
                    f'</details>'
                )

            lanes = [
                _render_ranked_lane("Atacados", "💣", neg_ranked, "Sem ataques na semana.", "attack"),
            ]

            if pos_ranked:
                lanes.append(_render_ranked_lane("Elogiados", "🏆", pos_ranked, "Sem elogios na semana.", "praise"))

            safe_ranked = [{"name": n, "count": 0} for n in not_targeted]
            lanes.append(
                _render_ranked_lane(
                    "Poupados",
                    "🛡️",
                    safe_ranked,
                    "Ninguém ficou poupado na semana.",
                    "safe",
                    highlight_top=False,
                    force_count=0,
                )
            )

            toggle_sections = [
                _render_toggle_pair_lane("Contradições", "⚡", contras, "contra"),
                _render_toggle_pair_lane("Conflito Confirmado", "🎯", aligned_neg, "aligned"),
            ]
            body_html = f'<div class="sinc-card">{"".join(lanes)}{"".join(toggle_sections)}</div>'
            count_txt = f"{len(neg_ranked) + len(pos_ranked)}" if (neg_ranked or pos_ranked) else ""

            print(f'''<div class="info-panel" style="border-left-color:{color};">
{card_header(card["icon"], card["title"], card.get("link"), count_txt, source_tag="📸 Sincerão", subtitle=subtitle)}
{body_html}
</div>''')

        # ── 🗳️ Paredão ──
        elif ctype == "paredao":
            payload = card.get("payload") or {}
            status_badge = payload.get("status_label", "Em votação")
            print(f'''<div class="info-panel" style="border-left-color:{color};">
{card_header(card["icon"], card["title"], card.get("link"), status_badge, source_tag="🧮 Nosso Modelo", subtitle="Leitura atual do paredão; quando fechar, o card troca para o resultado oficial.")}
{render_paredao_index_card(payload, AVATARS)}
</div>''')

        # ── 🎯 Mais Alvo ──
        elif ctype == "mais_alvo":
            items_accum = card.get("items", [])
            items_recent = card.get("items_recent", [])
            items_accum_all = card.get("items_all") or items_accum
            items_recent_all = card.get("items_recent_all") or items_recent
            total = card.get("total", len(items_accum))
            card_id = "alvo-toggle"

            def _render_alvo_rows(items, rid):
                worst = abs(items[0]["score"]) if items else 1
                html = f'<div id="{rid}" class="u-s058">'
                inline_items = items[:5]
                overflow_items = items[5:]
                for it in inline_items:
                    _name = it["name"]
                    _slug = _name.lower().replace(" ", "-")
                    score = it["score"]
                    bar_pct = min(100, abs(score) / worst * 100)
                    html += (
                        f'<div class="u-s056">'
                        f'<a href="#perfil-{_slug}" style="text-decoration:none">{av(_name, 42, "#c0392b")}</a>'
                        f'<div class="u-s066">'
                        f'<div class="u-s059">'
                        f'<a href="#perfil-{_slug}" class="fs-md u-s068" style="text-decoration:none;color:inherit">{_name.split()[0]}</a>'
                        f'<span class="text-neg fs-sm">{score:.1f}</span>'
                        f'</div>'
                        f'<div class="u-s014">'
                        f'<div style="width:{bar_pct:.0f}%;height:100%;background:#e74c3c;border-radius:3px;"></div>'
                        f'</div>'
                        f'</div></div>'
                    )
                if overflow_items:
                    html += (
                        f'<details class="sinc-more">'
                        f'<summary>+{len(overflow_items)} restantes</summary>'
                        f'<div class="u-s058">'
                    )
                    for it in overflow_items:
                        _name = it["name"]
                        _slug = _name.lower().replace(" ", "-")
                        score = it["score"]
                        bar_pct = min(100, abs(score) / worst * 100)
                        html += (
                            f'<div class="u-s056">'
                            f'<a href="#perfil-{_slug}" style="text-decoration:none">{av(_name, 42, "#c0392b")}</a>'
                            f'<div class="u-s066">'
                            f'<div class="u-s059">'
                            f'<a href="#perfil-{_slug}" class="fs-md u-s068" style="text-decoration:none;color:inherit">{_name.split()[0]}</a>'
                            f'<span class="text-neg fs-sm">{score:.1f}</span>'
                            f'</div>'
                            f'<div class="u-s014">'
                            f'<div style="width:{bar_pct:.0f}%;height:100%;background:#e74c3c;border-radius:3px;"></div>'
                            f'</div>'
                            f'</div></div>'
                        )
                    html += '</div></details>'
                html += '</div>'
                return html

            accum_html = _render_alvo_rows(items_accum_all, f"{card_id}-accum")
            recent_html = _render_alvo_rows(items_recent_all, f"{card_id}-recent")

            toggle_html = (
                f'<div style="display:flex;gap:6px;margin-bottom:8px;">'
                f'<button id="{card_id}-btn-accum" class="fs-2xs" onclick="'
                f"document.getElementById('{card_id}-accum').style.display='block';"
                f"document.getElementById('{card_id}-recent').style.display='none';"
                f"this.style.opacity='1';document.getElementById('{card_id}-btn-recent').style.opacity='0.5';"
                f'" style="padding:2px 8px;border:1px solid #555;border-radius:4px;background:#2a2a2a;color:#ccc;cursor:pointer;">Acumulado</button>'
                f'<button id="{card_id}-btn-recent" class="fs-2xs" onclick="'
                f"document.getElementById('{card_id}-recent').style.display='block';"
                f"document.getElementById('{card_id}-accum').style.display='none';"
                f"this.style.opacity='1';document.getElementById('{card_id}-btn-accum').style.opacity='0.5';"
                f'" style="padding:2px 8px;border:1px solid #555;border-radius:4px;background:#2a2a2a;color:#ccc;cursor:pointer;opacity:0.5;">Recente</button>'
                f'</div>'
            )

            # Recent starts hidden
            recent_html = recent_html.replace(f'id="{card_id}-recent"', f'id="{card_id}-recent" style="display:none"', 1)

            rows_html = toggle_html + accum_html + recent_html
            print(f'''<div class="info-panel" style="border-left-color:{color};">
{card_header(card["icon"], card["title"], card.get("link"), f"{total}", source_tag="📈 Acumulado", subtitle="Quem mais foi alvo de indicações, votos e eventos de poder. Alterne entre visão acumulada e recente.")}
{rows_html}
</div>''')

        # ── ⚔️ Mais Agressor ──
        elif ctype == "mais_agressor":
            items = card.get("items", [])
            items_all = card.get("items_all") or items
            total = card.get("total", len(items))
            worst_aggr = abs(items_all[0]["score"]) if items_all else 1
            inline_items = items_all[:5]
            overflow_items = items_all[5:]
            rows_html = '<div class="u-s058">'
            for it in inline_items:
                name = it["name"]
                name_slug = name.lower().replace(" ", "-")
                score = it["score"]
                bar_pct = min(100, abs(score) / worst_aggr * 100)
                rows_html += (
                    f'<div class="u-s056">'
                    f'<a href="#perfil-{name_slug}" style="text-decoration:none">{av(name, 42, "#8e44ad")}</a>'
                    f'<div class="u-s066">'
                    f'<div class="u-s059">'
                    f'<a href="#perfil-{name_slug}" class="fs-md u-s068" style="text-decoration:none;color:inherit">{name.split()[0]}</a>'
                    f'<span class="fs-sm" style="color:#8e44ad;font-weight:700">{score:.1f}</span>'
                    f'</div>'
                    f'<div class="u-s014">'
                    f'<div style="width:{bar_pct:.0f}%;height:100%;background:#8e44ad;border-radius:3px;"></div>'
                    f'</div>'
                    f'</div></div>'
                )
            if overflow_items:
                rows_html += (
                    f'<details class="sinc-more">'
                    f'<summary>+{len(overflow_items)} restantes</summary>'
                    f'<div class="u-s058">'
                )
                for it in overflow_items:
                    name = it["name"]
                    name_slug = name.lower().replace(" ", "-")
                    score = it["score"]
                    bar_pct = min(100, abs(score) / worst_aggr * 100)
                    rows_html += (
                        f'<div class="u-s056">'
                        f'<a href="#perfil-{name_slug}" style="text-decoration:none">{av(name, 42, "#8e44ad")}</a>'
                        f'<div class="u-s066">'
                        f'<div class="u-s059">'
                        f'<a href="#perfil-{name_slug}" class="fs-md u-s068" style="text-decoration:none;color:inherit">{name.split()[0]}</a>'
                        f'<span class="fs-sm" style="color:#8e44ad;font-weight:700">{score:.1f}</span>'
                        f'</div>'
                        f'<div class="u-s014">'
                        f'<div style="width:{bar_pct:.0f}%;height:100%;background:#8e44ad;border-radius:3px;"></div>'
                        f'</div>'
                        f'</div></div>'
                    )
                rows_html += '</div></details>'
            rows_html += '</div>'
            print(f'''<div class="info-panel" style="border-left-color:{color};">
{card_header(card["icon"], card["title"], card.get("link"), f"{total}", source_tag="📈 Acumulado", subtitle="Quem mais fez indicações, monstro, vetos e outros ataques deliberados ao longo do jogo.")}
{rows_html}
</div>''')

        # ── 🔴 Vulnerability ──
        elif ctype == "vulnerability":
            items = card.get("items", [])
            items_all = card.get("items_all") or items
            total = card.get("total", len(items))
            inline_items = items_all[:4]
            overflow_items = items_all[4:]
            rows_html = '<div class="u-s058">'
            for it in inline_items:
                name = it["name"]
                count = it["count"]
                level = it.get("level", "warning")
                enemies = it.get("enemies", [])
                level_color = "#e74c3c" if level == "critical" else "#f39c12"
                level_label = "MUITO VULNERÁVEL" if level == "critical" else "VULNERÁVEL"
                enemy_avatars = ''.join(av(e, 34, level_color) for e in enemies[:4])
                extra_enemies = len(enemies) - 4
                rows_html += (
                    f'<div class="u-s348">'
                    f'{av(name, 42, level_color)}'
                    f'<div class="u-s066">'
                    f'<div class="u-s347">'
                    f'<span class="fs-base u-s068">{name.split()[0]}</span>'
                    f'<span class="fs-2xs" style="padding:2px 6px;border-radius:4px;background:{level_color};color:#fff;font-weight:700;">{level_label}</span>'
                    f'<span class="fs-sm" style="color:{level_color};font-weight:600;">{count} falsos amigos</span>'
                    f'</div>'
                    f'<div class="u-s366">'
                    f'<span class="fs-2xs u-s251">Quem:</span>'
                    f'{enemy_avatars}'
                    f'{f"<span class=&quot;fs-2xs&quot; style=&quot;color:#888;&quot;>+{extra_enemies}</span>" if extra_enemies > 0 else ""}'
                    f'</div></div></div>'
                )
            if overflow_items:
                rows_html += (
                    f'<details class="sinc-more">'
                    f'<summary>+{len(overflow_items)} restantes</summary>'
                    f'<div class="u-s058">'
                )
                for it in overflow_items:
                    name = it["name"]
                    count = it["count"]
                    level = it.get("level", "warning")
                    enemies = it.get("enemies", [])
                    level_color = "#e74c3c" if level == "critical" else "#f39c12"
                    level_label = "MUITO VULNERÁVEL" if level == "critical" else "VULNERÁVEL"
                    enemy_avatars = ''.join(av(e, 34, level_color) for e in enemies[:4])
                    extra_enemies = len(enemies) - 4
                    rows_html += (
                        f'<div class="u-s348">'
                        f'{av(name, 42, level_color)}'
                        f'<div class="u-s066">'
                        f'<div class="u-s347">'
                        f'<span class="fs-base u-s068">{name.split()[0]}</span>'
                        f'<span class="fs-2xs" style="padding:2px 6px;border-radius:4px;background:{level_color};color:#fff;font-weight:700;">{level_label}</span>'
                        f'<span class="fs-sm" style="color:{level_color};font-weight:600;">{count} falsos amigos</span>'
                        f'</div>'
                        f'<div class="u-s366">'
                        f'<span class="fs-2xs u-s251">Quem:</span>'
                        f'{enemy_avatars}'
                        f'{f"<span class=&quot;fs-2xs&quot; style=&quot;color:#888;&quot;>+{extra_enemies}</span>" if extra_enemies > 0 else ""}'
                        f'</div></div></div>'
                    )
                rows_html += '</div></details>'
            rows_html += '</div>'
            print(f'''<div class="info-panel" style="border-left-color:{color};">
{card_header(card["icon"], card["title"], card.get("link"), f"{total}", source_tag="📈 Composto", subtitle="Falsos amigos: dá ❤️ a quem tem score negativo contra si (queridômetro + votos + eventos). Risco de voto surpresa.")}
{rows_html}
</div>''')

        # ── 💔 Streak Breaks ──
        elif ctype == "breaks":
            items = card.get("items", [])
            total = card.get("total", len(items))
            strong_count = card.get("strong_count", 0)
            severity_badge = f"{strong_count} graves" if strong_count else None
            break_ref_date = card.get("reference_date") or latest.get("date")

            def _break_row(it: dict) -> str:
                g = it["giver"]
                r = it["receiver"]
                streak = it["streak"]
                new_e = it.get("new_emoji", "?")
                sev = it.get("severity", "mild")
                date_str = it.get("date", "")
                try:
                    date_fmt = datetime.strptime(date_str, "%Y-%m-%d").strftime("%d/%m")
                except Exception:
                    date_fmt = ""
                age_txt = days_ago_str(date_str, break_ref_date)
                when_txt = f"{date_fmt} ({age_txt})" if date_fmt and age_txt else (date_fmt or age_txt)
                sev_txt = "Rompimento grave" if sev == "strong" else "Rompimento"
                meta_txt = f"{sev_txt} · {when_txt}" if when_txt else sev_txt
                return relationship_story_card(
                    g,
                    r,
                    f"{streak}d ❤️ → {new_e}",
                    meta_txt,
                    tone="break",
                )

            inline_items = items[:4]
            overflow_items = items[4:]
            rows_html = '<div class="u-s357">'
            rows_html += "".join(_break_row(it) for it in inline_items)
            if overflow_items:
                rows_html += (
                    f'<details class="sinc-more">'
                    f'<summary>+{len(overflow_items)} restantes</summary>'
                    f'<div class="u-s357">{"".join(_break_row(it) for it in overflow_items)}</div>'
                    f'</details>'
                )
            rows_html += '</div>'

            print(f'''<div class="info-panel" style="border-left-color:{color};">
{card_header(card["icon"], card["title"], card.get("link"), severity_badge or f"{total}", source_tag="📈 Histórico", subtitle="Rompimentos de alianças (histórico): data indica quando a ruptura ocorreu.")}
{rows_html}
</div>''')

        # ── 🛡️ Mais Blindados ──
        elif ctype == "blindados":
            items = card.get("items", [])
            n_par = card.get("n_paredoes", 1)
            inline_items = items[:5]
            overflow_items = items[5:]

            def _blindado_row(it: dict) -> str:
                name = it["name"]
                name_slug = name.lower().replace(" ", "-")
                paredao_count = it.get("paredao", 0)
                prot = it.get("protected", 0)
                avail = it.get("available", 0)
                votes = it.get("votes", 0)
                has_bv = it.get("bv_escape", False)
                bv_text = it.get("bv_text", "")
                protection_tags = it.get("protection_tags", [])

                border = "#3498db" if prot >= 3 else ("#27ae60" if paredao_count == 0 else "#f39c12")
                par_color = "#27ae60" if paredao_count == 0 else ("#f39c12" if paredao_count == 1 else "#e74c3c")
                par_label = f"{paredao_count} paredão" if paredao_count == 1 else f"{paredao_count} paredões"
                bar_pct = min(100, prot / n_par * 100) if n_par > 0 else 0
                tags = []
                if has_bv and bv_text:
                    tags.append(render_blindado_tag(bv_text, "escape"))
                for tag in protection_tags:
                    tone = "autoimmune" if tag.get("label") == "Autoimune" else ("leader" if tag.get("label") == "Líder" else "immune")
                    tags.append(render_blindado_tag(tag.get("text", ""), tone))
                tags_html = "".join(tags)
                extra_badges = f"<div class='blindado-tag-list'>{tags_html}</div>" if tags_html else ""

                return (
                    f'<div class="u-s056" style="align-items:flex-start;">'
                    f'<a href="#perfil-{name_slug}" style="text-decoration:none">{av(name, 42, border)}</a>'
                    f'<div class="u-s066">'
                    f'<div class="u-s059">'
                    f'<a href="#perfil-{name_slug}" class="fs-md u-s068" style="text-decoration:none;color:inherit">{name.split()[0]}</a>'
                    f'<span class="fs-sm" style="color:{par_color};font-weight:700;">{par_label}</span>'
                    f'</div>'
                    f'<div class="u-s014">'
                    f'<div style="width:{bar_pct:.0f}%;height:100%;background:#3498db;border-radius:3px;"></div>'
                    f'</div>'
                    f'<div class="fs-2xs" style="color:#888;">{votes} voto{"s" if votes != 1 else ""} em {avail} {"elegível" if avail == 1 else "elegíveis"} · protegido {prot}x</div>'
                    f'{extra_badges}'
                    f'</div></div>'
                )

            rows_html = '<div class="u-s058">'
            rows_html += "".join(_blindado_row(it) for it in inline_items)
            if overflow_items:
                rows_html += (
                    f'<details class="sinc-more">'
                    f'<summary>+{len(overflow_items)} restantes</summary>'
                    f'<div class="u-s058">{"".join(_blindado_row(it) for it in overflow_items)}</div>'
                    f'</details>'
                )
            rows_html += '</div>'

            print(f'''<div class="info-panel" style="border-left-color:{color};">
{card_header(card["icon"], card["title"], card.get("link"), f"{n_par} paredões", source_tag="📈 Acumulado", subtitle="Participantes mais protegidos nas votações da casa. Menos paredões + mais proteções = mais blindado.")}
{rows_html}
</div>''')

        # ── 👑 VIP / 🍳 Xepa (separate cards) ──
        elif ctype in ("vip", "xepa"):
            items = card.get("items", [])
            is_vip = ctype == "vip"
            accent = "#f1c40f" if is_vip else "#95a5a6"
            day_key = "vip" if is_vip else "xepa"
            max_days = max((it["total"] for it in items), default=1) or 1

            def _render_vx_row(it):
                name = it["name"]
                name_slug = name.lower().replace(" ", "-")
                days = it[day_key]
                total = it["total"]
                pct = round(days / total * 100) if total > 0 else 0
                bar_pct = min(100, days / max_days * 100) if max_days > 0 else 0
                return (
                    f'<div class="u-s056">'
                    f'<a href="#perfil-{name_slug}" style="text-decoration:none">{av(name, 38, accent)}</a>'
                    f'<div class="u-s066">'
                    f'<div class="u-s059">'
                    f'<a href="#perfil-{name_slug}" class="fs-sm u-s068" style="text-decoration:none;color:inherit">{name.split()[0]}</a>'
                    f'<span class="fs-sm" style="color:{accent};font-weight:700;">{days}d ({pct}%)</span>'
                    f'</div>'
                    f'<div class="u-s014">'
                    f'<div style="width:{bar_pct:.0f}%;height:100%;background:{accent};border-radius:3px;"></div>'
                    f'</div>'
                    f'</div></div>'
                )

            rows_html = '<div class="u-s058">'
            for it in items[:5]:
                rows_html += _render_vx_row(it)
            rows_html += '</div>'

            # Collapsible section for items beyond top 5
            rest = items[5:]
            if rest:
                rows_html += (
                    '<details style="margin-top:4px;">'
                    '<summary class="fs-2xs" style="color:#888;cursor:pointer;padding:4px 0;">'
                    f'+{len(rest)} restantes</summary>'
                    '<div class="u-s058">'
                )
                for it in rest:
                    rows_html += _render_vx_row(it)
                rows_html += '</div></details>'

            subtitle = "Quem passou mais dias no VIP ao longo do jogo." if is_vip else "Quem passou mais dias na Xepa ao longo do jogo."
            print(f'''<div class="info-panel" style="border-left-color:{color};">
{card_header(card["icon"], card["title"], card.get("link"), source_tag="📈 Acumulado", subtitle=subtitle)}
{rows_html}
</div>''')

        # ── 📅 Context — rendered in the header, not as a card ──
        elif ctype == "context":
            pass  # handled above in section header

    # ── 💰 Saldo de Estalecas (always last card, from profiles data) ──
    saldo_profiles = sorted(
        [p for p in index_data.get("profiles", []) if p.get("active", True)],
        key=lambda x: x.get("balance", 0), reverse=True
    )
    if saldo_profiles:
        max_bal = max(abs(p.get("balance", 0)) for p in saldo_profiles) or 1
        inline_profiles = saldo_profiles[:5]
        overflow_profiles = saldo_profiles[5:]
        saldo_rows = '<div class="u-s355">'
        medals = ["🥇", "🥈", "🥉", "4º", "5º"]
        for i, p in enumerate(inline_profiles):
            name = p["name"]
            bal = p.get("balance", 0)
            grupo = p.get("group", "")
            cor = GROUP_COLORS.get(grupo, "#999")
            bal_color = "#1a9850" if bal > 1000 else ("#66bd63" if bal > 0 else ("#888" if bal == 0 else "#e74c3c"))
            label = medals[i] if i < len(medals) else f"{i+1}º"
            bar_pct = min(100, abs(bal) / max_bal * 100) if max_bal > 0 else 0
            saldo_rows += (
                f'<div class="u-s056">'
                f'{av(name, 42, cor)}'
                f'<div class="u-s066">'
                f'<div class="u-s059">'
                f'<span class="fs-md u-s068">{label} {name.split()[0]}</span>'
                f'<span class="fs-base" style="color:{bal_color};font-weight:700;">{bal:,}</span>'
                f'</div>'
                f'<div class="u-s014">'
                f'<div style="width:{bar_pct:.0f}%;height:100%;background:{bal_color};border-radius:3px;"></div>'
                f'</div>'
                f'</div></div>'
            )
        if overflow_profiles:
            saldo_rows += (
                f'<details class="sinc-more">'
                f'<summary>+{len(overflow_profiles)} restantes</summary>'
                f'<div class="u-s355">'
            )
            for i, p in enumerate(overflow_profiles, start=len(inline_profiles) + 1):
                name = p["name"]
                bal = p.get("balance", 0)
                grupo = p.get("group", "")
                cor = GROUP_COLORS.get(grupo, "#999")
                bal_color = "#1a9850" if bal > 1000 else ("#66bd63" if bal > 0 else ("#888" if bal == 0 else "#e74c3c"))
                label = f"{i}º"
                bar_pct = min(100, abs(bal) / max_bal * 100) if max_bal > 0 else 0
                saldo_rows += (
                    f'<div class="u-s056">'
                    f'{av(name, 42, cor)}'
                    f'<div class="u-s066">'
                    f'<div class="u-s059">'
                    f'<span class="fs-md u-s068">{label} {name.split()[0]}</span>'
                    f'<span class="fs-base" style="color:{bal_color};font-weight:700;">{bal:,}</span>'
                    f'</div>'
                    f'<div class="u-s014">'
                    f'<div style="width:{bar_pct:.0f}%;height:100%;background:{bal_color};border-radius:3px;"></div>'
                    f'</div>'
                    f'</div></div>'
                )
            saldo_rows += '</div></details>'
        saldo_rows += '</div>'
        print(f'''<div class="info-panel u-s199">
{card_header("💰", "Saldo de Estalecas", "evolucao.html#saldo", source_tag="📸 Dado do dia", subtitle="Ranking dos participantes com mais estalecas. Moeda do jogo usada em compras e dinâmicas de poder.")}
{saldo_rows}
</div>''')

    print('</div>')  # close grid
```

```{python}
#| label: paredao-status-card
#| output: asis

paredao_card = index_data.get("paredao", {}).get("card")
if not (paredao_card and paredao_card.get("state") != "empty"):
    paredao_names = index_data.get("paredao", {}).get("names", [])
    if paredao_names:
        status_text = "Em Votação"
        status_color = "#e74c3c"
        status_icon = "🗳️"
        names_display = ", ".join(sorted(paredao_names))
        detail_html = f'<div class="fs-lg u-s022">Emparedados: <strong>{names_display}</strong></div>'
    else:
        status_text = "Aguardando formação"
        status_color = "#6c757d"
        status_icon = "⏳"
        detail_html = '<div class="fs-base u-s020">Nenhum paredão ativo no momento</div>'

    print(f'''
<div class="info-panel" style="padding: 1rem 1.2rem; margin: 1rem 0 1.5rem 0; border-left-color: {status_color}; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 1rem;">
<div>
<div class="fs-xl u-s385">
{status_icon} Paredão: <span style="color: {status_color};">{status_text}</span>
</div>
{detail_html}
<div class="fs-base u-s217">
<a href="paredao.html" class="u-s027">Paredão atual</a> · <a href="paredoes.html" class="u-s027">Arquivo de paredões</a>
</div>
</div>
<a href="paredao.html" class="fs-base" style="background: {status_color}; color: #fff; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border-radius: 6px; text-decoration: none; font-weight: 500; white-space: nowrap;">
Ver análise →
</a>
</div>
''')
```

# Rankings {#ranking-sentimento}

<style>
.ranking-mobile-summary,
.ranking-mobile-cta {
  display: none;
}

.ranking-mobile-summary {
  margin: 0.6rem 0 0.9rem;
}

.ranking-mobile-card {
  border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
  border-radius: 10px;
  padding: 0.75rem 0.8rem;
  margin-bottom: 0.65rem;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04);
}

.ranking-mobile-card h4 {
  margin: 0 0 0.45rem 0;
  font-size: var(--fs-lg);
  color: #fff;
}

.ranking-mobile-card ul {
  margin: 0.25rem 0 0;
  padding-left: 1rem;
  line-height: 1.35;
}

.ranking-mobile-card li {
  margin: 0.16rem 0;
  color: #d0d0d0;
  font-size: var(--fs-sm);
}

.ranking-mobile-kpis {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
  gap: 0.4rem;
}

.ranking-mobile-kpi {
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 0.35rem 0.25rem;
  text-align: center;
}

.ranking-mobile-kpi .v {
  display: block;
  font-size: var(--fs-xl);
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #fff;
  line-height: 1.1;
}

.ranking-mobile-kpi .l {
  display: block;
  font-size: var(--fs-2xs);
  color: #9aa0a6;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.04em;
}

.ranking-mobile-note {
  color: #9aa0a6;
  font-size: var(--fs-xs);
  line-height: 1.3;
}

@media (max-width: 575.98px) {
  #cell-sentiment-ranking-today,
  #cell-evolution-queridometro,
  #cell-evolution-strategic {
    display: none;
  }

  #tabset-1-1 > div:not(.ranking-mobile-summary),
  #tabset-1-2 > div:not(.ranking-mobile-summary),
  #tabset-2-2 > div:not(.ranking-mobile-summary),
  #tabset-1-1 > p.text-muted.small,
  #tabset-1-2 > p.text-muted.small {
    display: none !important;
  }

  .ranking-desktop-only {
    display: none !important;
  }

  .ranking-mobile-summary,
  .ranking-mobile-cta {
    display: block;
  }
}
</style>

```{python}
#| label: composite-score-desc
#| output: asis
print(ANALYSIS_DESCRIPTIONS["composite_score_chart"])
```

```{python}
#| label: ranking-prep
#| include: false

ranking_data = index_data.get("ranking", {})
_ranking_height = ranking_data.get("height", 500)
today_rows = ranking_data.get("today", [])


def _short_name(name):
    return (name or "?").split()[0]


def _fmt_signed(value, decimals=1):
    return f"{value:+.{decimals}f}"


def _render_list(rows, empty_text, value_fmt):
    if not rows:
        return f"<p class='ranking-mobile-note'>{empty_text}</p>"
    items = []
    for row in rows:
        nm = _short_name(row["name"])
        items.append(f"<li><strong>{nm}</strong>: {value_fmt(row)}</li>")
    return "<ul>" + "".join(items) + "</ul>"


def render_mobile_queridometro_summary(today_rows, change_week):
    if not today_rows:
        return "<div class='ranking-mobile-summary'><p class='ranking-mobile-note'>Sem dados de ranking.</p></div>"

    df = pd.DataFrame(today_rows).copy()
    df["score"] = pd.to_numeric(df.get("score", 0), errors="coerce").fillna(0.0)
    df["hearts"] = pd.to_numeric(df.get("hearts", 0), errors="coerce").fillna(0.0)
    df["negative"] = pd.to_numeric(df.get("negative", 0), errors="coerce").fillna(0.0)
    df["touch"] = df["hearts"] + df["negative"]
    df["neg_ratio"] = np.where(df["touch"] > 0, df["negative"] / df["touch"], 0.0)

    kpi_blindados = int((df["score"] >= 4).sum())
    kpi_neutros = int(((df["score"] >= -1) & (df["score"] <= 1)).sum())
    kpi_alerta = int((df["score"] <= -2).sum())

    pressure = (df[df["touch"] >= 8]
                .sort_values(["neg_ratio", "negative"], ascending=[False, False])
                .head(3))
    pressure_rows = [{
        "name": r["name"],
        "neg_ratio": r["neg_ratio"],
        "negative": r["negative"],
        "hearts": r["hearts"],
    } for _, r in pressure.iterrows()]

    week_up = sorted(
        [r for r in change_week if r.get("delta", 0) > 0],
        key=lambda x: x.get("delta", 0),
        reverse=True
    )[:2]
    week_down = sorted(
        [r for r in change_week if r.get("delta", 0) < 0],
        key=lambda x: x.get("delta", 0)
    )[:2]

    week_up_html = _render_list(
        week_up,
        "Sem subidas relevantes na semana.",
        lambda r: f"<span class='u-s054'>{_fmt_signed(r.get('delta', 0), 1)} pts</span>"
    )
    week_down_html = _render_list(
        week_down,
        "Sem quedas relevantes na semana.",
        lambda r: f"<span class='u-s005'>{_fmt_signed(r.get('delta', 0), 1)} pts</span>"
    )

    pressure_html = _render_list(
        pressure_rows,
        "Sem pressão de rejeição acima da média hoje.",
        lambda r: f"{(r['neg_ratio'] * 100):.0f}% negativas ({int(r['negative'])} neg / {int(r['hearts'])} ❤️)"
    )

    return (
        '<div class="ranking-mobile-summary">\n'
        '<div class="ranking-mobile-card">\n'
        '<h4>📱 Radar rápido (hoje)</h4>\n'
        '<div class="ranking-mobile-kpis">\n'
        f'<div class="ranking-mobile-kpi"><span class="v">{kpi_blindados}</span><span class="l">blindados (≥4)</span></div>\n'
        f'<div class="ranking-mobile-kpi"><span class="v">{kpi_neutros}</span><span class="l">zona cinza</span></div>\n'
        f'<div class="ranking-mobile-kpi"><span class="v">{kpi_alerta}</span><span class="l">alerta (≤-2)</span></div>\n'
        '</div>\n'
        '<p class="ranking-mobile-note u-s013">Resumo diferente do card do topo: foco em risco e concentração, não em pódio.</p>\n'
        '</div>\n'
        '<div class="ranking-mobile-card">\n'
        '<h4>🗓️ Viradas da semana</h4>\n'
        '<p class="ranking-mobile-note u-s011">Maior alta</p>\n'
        f'{week_up_html}\n'
        '<p class="ranking-mobile-note u-s089">Maior queda</p>\n'
        f'{week_down_html}\n'
        '</div>\n'
        '<div class="ranking-mobile-card">\n'
        '<h4>🔥 Pressão de rejeição</h4>\n'
        f'{pressure_html}\n'
        '</div>\n'
        '<div class="ranking-mobile-cta ranking-mobile-note">\n'
        'Gráfico completo no desktop ou na página dedicada:\n'
        '<a href="evolucao.html#sentimento" class="u-s059">ver evolução do queridômetro ↗</a>\n'
        '</div>\n'
        '</div>'
    )


def _recent_swings(data_rows, score_key, lookback_days=7):
    if not data_rows:
        return [], [], None, None

    df = pd.DataFrame(data_rows).copy()
    if df.empty or "name" not in df.columns or "date" not in df.columns or score_key not in df.columns:
        return [], [], None, None

    df["date"] = pd.to_datetime(df["date"], errors="coerce")
    df = df.dropna(subset=["date"]).sort_values("date")
    if df.empty:
        return [], [], None, None

    unique_dates = sorted(df["date"].drop_duplicates())
    if len(unique_dates) < 2:
        return [], [], None, None

    start_idx = max(0, len(unique_dates) - 1 - lookback_days)
    start_date = unique_dates[start_idx]
    end_date = unique_dates[-1]

    window = df[df["date"] >= start_date].copy()
    first_vals = window.groupby("name")[score_key].first()
    last_vals = window.groupby("name")[score_key].last()
    deltas = (last_vals - first_vals).dropna()
    if deltas.empty:
        return [], [], start_date, end_date

    top_up = deltas.sort_values(ascending=False).head(3)
    top_down = deltas.sort_values().head(3)

    up_rows = [{
        "name": n,
        "delta": float(v),
        "current": float(last_vals.get(n, np.nan)),
    } for n, v in top_up.items()]
    down_rows = [{
        "name": n,
        "delta": float(v),
        "current": float(last_vals.get(n, np.nan)),
    } for n, v in top_down.items()]

    return up_rows, down_rows, start_date, end_date


def render_mobile_evolution_summary(data_rows, score_key, section_title, cta_href, score_decimals=1):
    up_rows, down_rows, start_date, end_date = _recent_swings(data_rows, score_key, lookback_days=7)
    if start_date is None or end_date is None:
        return (
            "<div class='ranking-mobile-summary'>"
            "<p class='ranking-mobile-note'>Sem série temporal suficiente para resumo móvel.</p>"
            "</div>"
        )

    date_window = f"{start_date.strftime('%d/%m')} → {end_date.strftime('%d/%m')}"
    delta_fmt = lambda r: (
        f"<span style='color:{'#27ae60' if r['delta'] >= 0 else '#e74c3c'};'>"
        f"{_fmt_signed(r['delta'], score_decimals)}</span>"
        f" (agora {r['current']:+.{score_decimals}f})"
    )

    up_html = _render_list(up_rows[:2], "Sem altas relevantes no período.", delta_fmt)
    down_html = _render_list(down_rows[:2], "Sem quedas relevantes no período.", delta_fmt)

    return (
        '<div class="ranking-mobile-summary">\n'
        '<div class="ranking-mobile-card">\n'
        f'<h4>📈 {section_title} — últimos 7 dias</h4>\n'
        f'<p class="ranking-mobile-note u-s011">Janela: {date_window}</p>\n'
        '<p class="ranking-mobile-note u-s439">Subidas</p>\n'
        f'{up_html}\n'
        '<p class="ranking-mobile-note u-s089">Quedas</p>\n'
        f'{down_html}\n'
        '</div>\n'
        '<div class="ranking-mobile-cta ranking-mobile-note">\n'
        'Série completa:\n'
        f'<a href="{cta_href}" class="u-s059">abrir gráficos detalhados ↗</a>\n'
        '</div>\n'
        '</div>'
    )
```

::: {.panel-tabset}

## Queridômetro

```{python}
#| label: ranking-mobile-summary-queridometro
#| output: asis

print(render_mobile_queridometro_summary(today_rows, ranking_data.get("change_week", [])))
```

```{python}
#| label: sentiment-ranking-today

fig = make_sentiment_ranking(today_rows, title_suffix=latest.get("label", ""), fixed_height=_ranking_height)
fig.show()
```

## Evolução

```{python}
#| label: evolution-shared
#| include: false

# Shared setup for evolution charts
_paredoes_markers = []
_paredoes_json = load_paredoes_raw()
if _paredoes_json.get('paredoes'):
    for _p in _paredoes_json['paredoes']:
        _paredoes_markers.append({
            'date': pd.to_datetime(_p['data']),
            'label': f"🗳️ {_p['numero']}º Paredão",
        })

# Consistent color palette across both charts
_all_participants = sorted(set(
    row["name"] for row in index_data.get("timeline", [])
))
_palette = (
    px.colors.qualitative.Plotly + px.colors.qualitative.D3 +
    px.colors.qualitative.Set2 + px.colors.qualitative.Bold
)
_part_colors = {name: _palette[i % len(_palette)] for i, name in enumerate(_all_participants)}


def make_evolution_chart(data_rows, score_key, title, y_label, score_fmt="+.1f"):
    """Build an evolution chart with rank annotations and paredão markers."""
    if not data_rows:
        return None

    df = pd.DataFrame([{
        "Data": pd.to_datetime(row["date"]),
        "Participante": row["name"],
        "Score": row[score_key],
        "Grupo": row.get("group", "?"),
        "Rank": row.get("rank"),
    } for row in data_rows])

    if df.empty or len(df['Data'].unique()) < 2:
        return None

    all_parts = sorted(df['Participante'].unique())

    # Find biggest movers: participants with largest score change from first to last appearance
    first_scores = df.sort_values('Data').groupby('Participante')['Score'].first()
    last_scores = df.sort_values('Data').groupby('Participante')['Score'].last()
    deltas = (last_scores - first_scores).dropna()

    top5 = set(last_scores.nlargest(5).index)
    bottom5 = set(last_scores.nsmallest(5).index)
    movers = set(deltas.abs().nlargest(5).index)
    highlight = top5 | bottom5

    fig = go.Figure()

    for name in all_parts:
        df_p = df[df['Participante'] == name].sort_values('Data')
        is_hl = name in highlight
        is_mover = name in movers

        # Use precomputed rank from data
        ranks = df_p['Rank'].tolist() if 'Rank' in df_p.columns else [None] * len(df_p)

        hover_text = [
            f"{name}: {s:{score_fmt}} (#{r})" if r else f"{name}: {s:{score_fmt}}"
            for s, r in zip(df_p['Score'], ranks)
        ]

        fig.add_trace(go.Scatter(
            x=df_p['Data'], y=df_p['Score'],
            mode='lines+markers',
            name=f"{'📈 ' if is_mover and name in movers - highlight else ''}{name}",
            line=dict(
                width=3 if is_hl else 1.5,
                color=_part_colors.get(name, '#999'),
            ),
            marker=dict(size=6 if is_hl else 3),
            hovertext=hover_text,
            hoverinfo='text',
            visible=True if is_hl else 'legendonly',
        ))

    # Rank annotations at last date for visible traces
    last_date = df['Data'].max()
    last_df = df[df['Data'] == last_date].copy()
    if 'Rank' not in last_df.columns or last_df['Rank'].isna().all():
        last_df['Rank'] = last_df['Score'].rank(ascending=False, method='min').astype(int)
    for _, row in last_df.iterrows():
        if row['Participante'] in highlight:
            fig.add_annotation(
                x=last_date, y=row['Score'],
                text=f"#{int(row['Rank'])}",
                showarrow=False,
                font=dict(size=9, color='#aaa'),
                xshift=28,
            )

    # Zero line
    fig.add_shape(type='line',
                  x0=df['Data'].min(), x1=df['Data'].max(),
                  y0=0, y1=0,
                  line=dict(color='red', dash='dash', width=1))

    # Paredão markers
    y_min = df['Score'].min()
    y_max = df['Score'].max()
    y_range = [y_min - abs(y_max - y_min) * 0.1, y_max + abs(y_max - y_min) * 0.1]
    for marker in _paredoes_markers:
        if df['Data'].min() <= marker['date'] <= df['Data'].max():
            fig.add_shape(
                type='line', x0=marker['date'], x1=marker['date'],
                y0=y_range[0], y1=y_range[1],
                line=dict(color='#FF6B6B', dash='dot', width=1.5),
            )
            fig.add_annotation(
                x=marker['date'], y=y_range[1],
                text=marker['label'],
                showarrow=False,
                font=dict(size=10, color='#FF6B6B'),
                yshift=10,
            )

    fig.update_layout(
        title=title,
        xaxis_title="Data",
```
